Motion To Vacate Judgment & To Stay Enforcement Of Writ Of Execution For Possession
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: (Late add-on)
APPEAR: Mark J. Romeo, Esq. 362-1717 for pltf & opposing party; Sheila Gropper Nelson, Esq. 362-4700 specially appearing for David Replogle, Esq. for defts & moving parties.
RULING: The Court's tentative ruling is as follows: Grant motion to set aside on condition defendant obtains another trial date of 03/11/02; award fees of $1,636.50, deft to pay pltf within 30 days. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order signed in open court.
